column1: # Hooks allowlist — intentionally WIRE-READY but NOT registered.
# Each entry MUST cite spec/rule explaining deliberate non-registration.

column2: SPEC-125 Slice 1 — WIRE-READY, moved to _legacy/ (PreOutput not available in OpenCode). See header of the .sh file.

SPEC-125 Slice 3 — WIRE-READY, NO-OP por defecto. Activacion requiere edicion humana de .claude/settings.json y RECOMMENDATION_TRIBUNAL_FOLLOWUP_ACTIVE=1. Mismo gate que Slice 1 (recommendation-tribunal-pre-output.sh).
SPEC-169 AC-4 — Hook PostToolUse WIRE-READY, NO-OP por defecto sin TWIN_HOOK_ENABLED=true. Activacion requiere configuracion explicita en settings.json.
